# Fix 21.2.5 — correctifs vs 21.2.4

> Correctifs livrés par le patch `21.2.5` (publié le 2026-06-10). La documentation de cette skill (`references/`) reflète le **dernier** patch de la mineure : si votre projet est sur un patch **antérieur** à `21.2.5`, les correctifs ci-dessous ne sont **pas** dans votre version.
> Storybook exact de ce patch : https://lucca-front.lucca.io/v21.2.5/storybook

## API (diff structurel)

### bubble-icon

~ `size` : 'S' | 'M' | 'L' → 'XS' | 'S' | 'M' | 'L'

### tooltip

`LuTooltipTriggerDirective` :
  ~ `luTooltipAnchor` : FlexibleConnectedPositionStrategyOrigin → FlexibleConnectedPositionStrategyOrigin | LuTooltipAnchorRef | null | undefined


## Stories (sources)

Diff complet des sources de stories (`stories/`) entre `v21.2.4` et `v21.2.5`. Les suppressions embarquent le contenu supprimé.

````diff
diff --git a/stories/documentation/loaders/skeleton-field/angular/skeleton-field.stories.ts b/stories/documentation/loaders/skeleton-field/angular/skeleton-field.stories.ts
index e940e27f1..e479097ba 100644
--- a/stories/documentation/loaders/skeleton-field/angular/skeleton-field.stories.ts
+++ b/stories/documentation/loaders/skeleton-field/angular/skeleton-field.stories.ts
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ export const Template: StoryObj<SkeletonFieldComponent> = {
 			control: {
 				type: 'select',
 			},
-			description: 'Modifie la taille du composant.',
+			description: '[v21.2.4] Modifie la taille du composant.',
 		},
 	},
 
diff --git a/stories/documentation/structure/bubble-icon/angular/basic.stories.ts b/stories/documentation/structure/bubble-icon/angular/basic.stories.ts
index 7335f6b0c..5f796e39c 100644
--- a/stories/documentation/structure/bubble-icon/angular/basic.stories.ts
+++ b/stories/documentation/structure/bubble-icon/angular/basic.stories.ts
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ export default {
 			description: 'Définit une direction de la bulle. Aléatoire par défaut.',
 		},
 		size: {
-			options: ['S', 'M', 'L'],
+			options: ['XS', 'S', '', 'L'],
 			control: {
 				type: 'select',
 			},
@@ -74,7 +74,7 @@ export default {
 	],
 	render: ({ bubbleDirection, alt, palette, size, ...args }, { argTypes }) => {
 		const sizeArg = size === 'M' ? `` : ` size="${size}"`;
-		const directionArg = bubbleDirection === 'random' ? `` : ` bubbleDirection="${bubbleDirection}"`;
+		const directionArg = bubbleDirection === 'random' || bubbleDirection === '' ? `` : ` bubbleDirection="${bubbleDirection}"`;
 		const altArg = alt === '' ? `` : ` alt="${alt}"`;
 		const paletteArg = palette === 'product' ? `` : ` palette="${palette}"`;
 		return {

+								<span class="radioField-icon" aria-hidden="true"><span class="radioField-icon-check"></span></span>
+							</span>
+							<div class="inlineMessage" id="IDmessageRadioB4">
+								<p class="inlineMessage-content">Helper text</p>
+							</div>
 						</div>
-					</div>
-				</fieldset>
+					</fieldset>
+				</div>
+			</td>
+			<td>
+				<div class="demo-QAtable-list">
+					<lu-form-field label="Label" required invalid>
+						<lu-radio-group-input [(ngModel)]="radioError">
+							<lu-radio value="A" inlineMessage="Helper text">Label A</lu-radio>
+							<lu-radio value="B" inlineMessage="Helper text">Label B</lu-radio>
+						</lu-radio-group-input>
+					</lu-form-field>
+				</div>
 			</td>
 		</tr>
 	</tbody>
````
